$description: Border radius design tokens — Zorka. Rounds element corners to soften the UI and improve usability.

md.$description: Medium buttons, inputs, text fields, small cards, dropdowns, banners, tags, etc.

lg.$description: Large buttons, medium cards, modals, etc.

2xl.$description: Screenshots, media frames and hero cards — the Zorka 'shot' frame.

pill.$description: Chips and pill badges — a Zorka signature element (thin border, wide padding).
